title: polystachya concreta
intro: Polystachya concreta, also known as the concretion polystachya, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. It has been found to have medicinal properties, with its extracts exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Polystachya concreta include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Polystachya concreta can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional African medicine.
